test-method.name: testValidLogin
test-method.description: Valid credentials should redirect to the dashboard

test-method.name: testEmptyBranchValidation
test-method.description: Submitting an empty branch form should show required-field errors

test-method.name: testAddBranch
test-method.description: A fully filled branch form should submit without errors

test-method.name: testBranchNameWithNumbers
test-method.description: Branch name should not accept numeric values

test-method.name: testInvalidPhoneNumber
test-method.description: Phone number should be exactly 10 digits

test-method.name: testAddCompany
test-method.description: Adding a new company with valid data should succeed

test-method.name: testDuplicateCompanyValidation
test-method.description: Adding a company that already exists should show a duplicate error

exception.message: Duplicate-company error should appear expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Duplicate-company error should appear expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.hrms.tests.CompanyMasterTest.testDuplicateCompanyValidation(CompanyMasterTest.java:61) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:413) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:373) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:312) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1274) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1208) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1112) at org.testng.TestNG.run(TestNG.java:1079) at org.apache.maven.surefire.testng.TestNGExecutor.run(TestNGExecutor.java:308) at org.apache.maven.surefire.testng.TestNGXmlTestSuite.execute(TestNGXmlTestSuite.java:71) at org.apache.maven.surefire.testng.TestNGProvider.invoke(TestNGProvider.java:113) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.runSuitesInProcess(ForkedBooter.java:385) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.execute(ForkedBooter.java:162) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.run(ForkedBooter.java:507) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.main(ForkedBooter.java:495)

test-method.name: testDeleteCompany
test-method.description: Deleting the last company in the list should complete without error

test-method.name: testAddInterviewMode
test-method.description: Adding a new interview mode with valid data should succeed

test-method.name: testBlankInterviewModeValidation
test-method.description: Verify blank validation for interview mode form

test-method.name: testAddInterviewRound
test-method.description: Adding a new interview timeline with valid data should succeed

test-method.name: testBlankInterviewRoundValidation
test-method.description: Verify blank validation for interview timeline form

test-method.name: testAdddesignation
test-method.description: Adding a new Designation with valid data should succeed

test-method.name: testDuplicateDesignationValidation
test-method.description: Adding a Designation that already exists should show a duplicate error

exception.message: Duplicate-Designation error should appear expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Duplicate-Designation error should appear expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: testDeleteCompany
test-method.description: Deleting the last Designation in the list should complete without error

test-method.name: testAddDepartment
test-method.description: Adding a new department with valid data should succeed

test-method.name: testDuplicateDepartmentValidation
test-method.description: Adding a department that already exists should show a duplicate error

exception.message: Duplicate-Department error should appear expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: testDeleteDepartment
test-method.description: Deleting the last department in the list should complete without error
